channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Rehabilitation)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Rehabilitation) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Well-being and support preferences of siblings of individuals with a neurodevelopmental condition in regional and remote Australia: a mixed methods investigation
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Rehabilitation Score: 47 Autoren: Samuel Antonio, Kate Jamieson, Kate P. Dorozenko, Emma J. Glasson, Chloe Maxwell-Smith Journal: Disability and Rehabilitation Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-08 DOI: 10.1080/09638288.2026.2663921 ISSN: 0963-8288 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-07

item.title: An independent validation of a clinical prediction rule for the diagnosis of cervical radiculopathy with radicular pain
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Rehabilitation Score: 40 Autoren: Francis Grondin, Chad Cook, Toby Hall, Olivier Maillard, Yannick Perdrix, Sebastien Freppel Journal: Brazilian Journal of Physical Therapy Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.bjpt.2026.101581 ISSN: 1413-3555 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-07

item.title: Advantages and disadvantages of noise-cancelling headphones for autistic students in educational settings
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Rehabilitation Score: 29 Autoren: M. Herrebrøden, G. Marentakis, A. Dechsling, G. Esposito, D. Dimitriou, A. Nordahl-Hansen Journal: Research in Developmental Disabilities Veröffentlicht: 2026-06-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ridd.2026.105301 ISSN: 0891-4222 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-07

item.title: Pain Characteristics and Mechanisms Across Gait Disability Levels in Individuals with Multiple Sclerosis
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Rehabilitation Score: 21 Autoren: Libak Abou, Nora Fritz, Anna L Kratz Journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.apmr.2026.02.392 ISSN: 0003-9993 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-07

item.title: Prevention and management of cardiovascular disease in adults with cancer: an International Cardio-Oncology Society (IC-OS) and Multinational Association of Supportive Care in Cancer (MASCC) clinical practice statement
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Rehabilitation Score: 14 Autoren: Susan Dent, Michelle B. Nadler, Anne Blaes, Ahamed Iqbal, Hannah Naa Gogwe Ayettey, Jose Alvarez-Cardona, Alexandre Chan, Eng-Siew Koh, Raul Cordoba Mascunano, Mridula George, Naa Adorkor Aryeetey, Erin J. Howden, Sase Kazuhiro, Nida Latif, Aya F. Ozaki, Cherith J. Semple, Tharshini Ramalingan, Neil M. Iyenger, Hope S. Rugo, Bogda Koczwara Journal: Supportive Care in Cancer Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1007/s00520-026-10741-8 ISSN: 0941-4355 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-07
